data.title: Limble appoints Gary Specter as CEO to lead company growth. Utah-based modern maintenance platform.
data.description: An experienced CEO, Gary Specter, has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of Limble, a modern maintenance and asset management platform based in LEHI, Utah. The announcement was made on Jan. 21, 2026. Specter brings with him extensive experience to drive the company's growth and enhance customer value. This move is aimed at propelling Limble into its next phase of development.

data.title: Fox Corp (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) to discuss Q2 2026 financial results via webcast on Feb 4, 2026, starting 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Fox Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as FOXA and FOX, is set to present its second-quarter fiscal 2026 financial figures through a live audio webcast from New York and Los Angeles on February 4, 2026. The webcast will commence at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time and 5:30 a.m. Pacific Time. The financial outcomes will be disclosed at around 8:00 a.m. ET.

data.title: Nordstrom Rack moving Downtown Seattle store to 601 Pine St, opening in spring 2027. Exciting relocation news.
data.description: In Seattle on January 21, 2026, Nordstrom, Inc., a fashion retailer, revealed intentions to move its Nordstrom Rack Downtown Seattle store to a new location at 601 Pine St. The store is expected to open its doors in the spring of 2027. The company expressed enthusiasm about introducing customers to the refreshed downtown store.

data.title: Thousands of women suing Johnson & Johnson over talc powder causing cancer; court recommends expert testimony at trial. J&J ordered to pay $1.5 billion to a woman in December; federal litigation moving closer to first trial.
data.description: Thousands of women are involved in lawsuits against Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) alleging that their talc-based baby powder led to ovarian cancer. A court-appointed special master has recommended that expert witnesses for these women be permitted to testify at trial. In December 2025, a Baltimore jury ruled in favor of a woman and ordered Johnson & Johnson and its subsidiaries to pay over $1.5 billion. The woman claimed that asbestos exposure in the talc-based products caused her peritoneal mesothelioma. This development brings the federal litigation closer to its first trial, expected later this year, despite the company's objections to the scientific evidence. Retired U.S. District Judge Freda Wolfson issued the recommendation to allow expert testimony in cases pending in federal court in New Jersey. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global pet grooming services market set to grow from USD 7.25B in 2025 to USD 11.80B by 2032, with a CAGR of 7.20%.
data.description: Dublin - A new report on the Pet Grooming Services Market indicates promising growth prospects, with the market size expected to increase from USD 7.25 billion in 2025 to USD 7.75 billion in 2026. The forecast predicts a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.20%, with the market projected to reach USD 11.80 billion by 2032. Factors such as evolving consumer demands, service advancements, and higher industry standards are driving transformations within the pet grooming sector, elevating it beyond traditional practices.

data.title: Yamaha celebrates 60 years at NAMM Show 2026 with new models. World's top instrument manufacturer.
data.description: In Buena Park, California, on January 21, 2026, Yamaha, the prominent musical instrument manufacturer, released exclusive 60th Anniversary models as well as the new Chris Buck Signature Revstar, Pacifica™ SC Series, and TransAcoustic TAS3 C guitars. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it celebrates its 60th anniversary by showcasing these new products to its loyal customers. The company continues to be a pioneer in the industry, with a reputation for producing high-quality instruments.

data.title: Can-Am racer Kyle Chaney finishes 2nd overall at 2026 Dakar Rally after covering 8,000km. Maverick R showcased with stage wins.
data.description: Can-Am has reaffirmed the Maverick R as a leading racing side-by-side by securing stage wins and providing crucial development feedback during an arduous rally spanning 8,000 kilometers. The renowned brand of BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ:...) showcased its dominance in the race, marking a significant achievement in its legacy.

data.title: Lodi's Modern Dental & Implants named top patient-rated dentist for 2026 in San Joaquin County.
data.description: A reputable dental practice in Lodi offers top-notch oral care in eleven specialized fields, integrating advanced implant knowledge with caring, patient-centered attention that has established it as a reliable choice for families in San Joaquin County. Located in LODI, Calif., as of Jan. 21, 2026, this practice continues to serve a wide range of patients seeking dental services.

data.title: BCH could hit $720-$750 by Feb 2026, analysts say. That’s 25-31% higher than current level of $574, despite mixed signals.
data.description: Several experts predict that Bitcoin Cash may reach a range of $720 to $750 by February 2026, showing a potential increase of 25% to 31% from its current price of $574. This growth is expected despite conflicting technical indicators.

data.title: Prudent AI introduces industry's first universal income platform, Prudent AI Upfront Income, ensuring qualified income certainty from day one.
data.description: A new universal income platform called Prudent AI Upfront Income has been introduced by Prudent AI in Dover, Del. This platform is the first of its kind and provides qualified income calculations with certainty on the very first day.

data.title: Brother launches upgraded inkjet printers with 11"x17" output, enterprise-class features at accessible prices.
data.description: Brother International Corporation has recently released upgraded business inkjet printers that offer vibrant 11" x 17" output and complete functionality. These new printers provide enterprise-class capabilities to businesses of all sizes, and they come at an affordable price. This announcement was made in Bridgewater, New Jersey on January 21, 2026. Brother International Corporation is known for being a prominent player in imaging technology.

data.title: Naturally Network marks five years of Naturally Rising with the 2026 Pitch Competition, offering growth chances for brands. Applications open.
data.description: The latest edition of the Naturally Rising Pitch Competition is set to provide significant exposure and expansion prospects for up-and-coming, mission-oriented brands within the natural products sector. Taking place in New York on January 21, 2026, Naturally Network has revealed that aspiring participants can now submit their applications for the 2026 competition, emphasizing the chance for emerging brands to gain valuable visibility and access growth opportunities in the industry.

data.title: RAFTRx appoints Denis Gaynor as CMO to lead growth in 16 states, 36 markets, and 9 brands, with 20+ years of experience in consumer marketing.
data.description: Atlanta-based RAFTR Roofing + Exteriors (RAFTRx), a prominent company offering roofing and storm restoration services, has recently appointed Denis Gaynor as its Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Gaynor, with over 20 years of consumer marketing experience in digital and home services industries, previously held significant positions at Microsoft, Amazon, and Renovo. RAFTRx operates in 16 states, across 36 markets, and under 9 brand names. Gaynor's expertise includes scaling marketing teams and enhancing customer engagement.

data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on January 21, 2026, mPower Technology, Inc., a pioneer in flexible solar power solutions for space applications, unveiled the addition of four top-level executives to its management group.
